title: Alcohols
summary: 9701 A Level alcohols — classification, oxidation, dehydration, and esterification.
learningObjectives: Classify primary, secondary, and tertiary alcohols.
Predict oxidation products under different conditions.

simpleExplanation.title: A Level alcohol chemistry
simpleExplanation.summary: A Level extends AS alcohol work with finer control of oxidation and mechanistic reasoning for elimination.
steps: 1° → aldehyde → carboxylic acid on further oxidation.
Conc H₂SO₄ heat eliminates H₂O to alkene.

sections.content: **Alcohols** (32.1) at A Level builds on **16.1**. Compare **reagents, conditions, and products** for each class.
